description_long: This is a vibrant, multi-tiered celebration cake featuring two stacked layers, each decorated with colorful fondant and icing. The lower tier is adorned with a garden motif, including flowers, grass, and cartoon-like figures of two children standing at the front. The upper tier is decorated with clouds, a sun, and a volcano-like structure on top, surrounded by strawberries and other playful elements. The cake is covered in a variety of bright colors, with detailed piping and fondant work creating a festive, whimsical appearance. The front of the cake displays a 'Happy Birthday' message and the word 'SUPER' in bold letters. The cake sits on a white, square tray with additional floral decorations around its base.
description: A colorful, two-tiered celebration cake with fondant flowers, cartoon children, and a volcano topper, set on a white tray. The cake features vibrant decorations and a festive birthday theme.
description_view_0: Front view showing two cartoon children, a 'Happy Birthday' message, and the word 'SUPER' with strawberries and stars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow lattice pattern, fondant flowers, and one of the cartoon children, with the volcano topper visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the volcano topper, blue sky with clouds and sun, and a ring of strawberries around the upper tier.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other cartoon child, more fondant flowers, and the colorful garden motif wrapping around the cake.
